purpose: Lightweight per-session handoff log. One block per session tracking what happened and where the next session picks up. Details live in progress-phase2.json (source of truth) — do NOT duplicate decisions/build-order/state here.
how_to_use: APPEND one new block to handoffs[] at the end of each session (newest last). Never rewrite prior blocks. Bump version.

handoffs.did: Deep-planned S2, S3, S4 (were scope-only). Recorded sync/async model + blocking-call decision in S1.4/S1-D13. Phase 2 planning now COMPLETE for all 4 sections.
handoffs.next: Build Phase 2 S1 V1 (custom-LLM orchestration loop) — the gating dependency for S2/S3/S4.
handoffs.start_from: progress-phase2.json -> S1_agent_design.S1_SUMMARY.v1_build_order (steps 1-7). Follow CLAUDE.md strictly (esp. web-verify LiteLLM/Gemini + VAPI shapes before coding the LLM layer).
handoffs.handoff_summary: What this session did: Deep-planned the three remaining Phase 2 sections — S2 (CRM/Memory), S3 (Logging/Tracing), S4 (Post-processing/Metrics). Phase 2 planning is now complete for all four sections. Also recorded the sync/async architecture decision (S1-D13) and created this handoff log. Key decisions locked: (1) One shared SQLite DB (data/conversations.db, stdlib sqlite3, no new dep) is the substrate for S2 (calls, messages), S3 (turns trace), and S4 (metrics-as-SQL). (2) Cross-call memory read-side pulled into V1 — two-tier and gated (recognition pre-verification, recall only after identity_verified, claim_status never in memory). (3) S3 trace -> turns table, written after the SSE stream closes; token counts via LiteLLM usage (include_usage + token_counter fallback). (4) S4 post-processing is our own synchronous LiteLLM pass in the end-of-call webhook (drops Phase 1 polling); flat structured output {summary, sentiment, resolution_status, primary_topic}; containment is code-derived, never the LLM; metrics compute pulled into V1 (app/metrics.py, pure SQL). (5) Sync/async: async FastAPI, one concurrent asyncio task (the extractor), caller-facing work stays sequential; blocking requests/sqlite accepted at single-caller demo scale. State: no Phase 2 code yet; Phase 1 (VAPI-native) still the working demo fallback — don't touch except the reused end-of-call webhook. Where the next session starts: build S1 V1 (the custom-LLM orchestration loop) — it's the gating dependency; S2/S3/S4 all hook into it. Follow progress-phase2.json -> S1_agent_design.S1_SUMMARY.v1_build_order (steps 1-7). Per CLAUDE.md, web-verify before coding the LLM layer: LiteLLM<->Gemini 2.5 Flash exact model id + streaming + tool-calling API, and the VAPI incoming /chat/completions messages shape. Note: litellm is missing from requirements.txt (only google-generativeai is there) — add it.

handoffs.did: BUILT Phase 2 S1-S4 V1 end-to-end and VALIDATED it on a real VAPI telephony call. Wrote the whole custom-LLM agentic layer (app/agent/*: state, prompts/renderer-as-gate, tools, loop/extractor, knowledge), the SSE endpoint (api/routers/chat.py), the SQLite store (services/store.py, self-healing), post-processing (services/postprocess.py), metrics (app/metrics.py), fallbacks.json, harness.py, METRICS.md. Extended the end-of-call webhook (phase-1/phase-2 branch). Reorg: docs+data json moved to docs/. Fixed, in order: VAPI custom-LLM auth (query-param ?secret=, strips VAPI's appended /chat/completions), logging (durable log/app.log catch-all + global exception handler), webhook error-handling (200-always, Airtable sync no-retry, SQLite fallback w/ airtable_synced), store self-heal (no more 'no such table'). All automated tests green + real VAPI call worked.
handoffs.next: V2 optimizations. TOP PRIORITY per user: streaming-with-tool-interception to cut the ~2.6s/turn latency (currently resolve-then-stream — a full non-streamed generation before any SSE). Then: re-read TASK.md and align the build tightly to the assignment deliverables; fine-tune the system prompt; test MORE scenarios (no-record, identity-denied escalation, FAQ variety, 911/safety, off-topic, returning-caller memory); improve logging further; other aspects. USER WILL GIVE MORE DETAIL AT THE START OF THE NEXT SESSION — wait for it before diving in.
handoffs.start_from: docs/progress-phase2.json is the source of truth. Read status + these turn blocks in order: build_state_turn25 (what was built + the 1 deviation: chunk-string streaming, not include_usage), live_verified_turn26, webhook_error_handling_turn27 (S4-D7), auth_fix_turn28, logging_improvement_turn29, live_vapi_call_turn30. Then re-read docs/TASK.md for the assignment. Run tests to confirm green before changing anything: `python harness.py` (deterministic), `python harness.py --live` (real Gemini; needs GEMINI_API_KEY in .env), and scratchpad/verify_e2e.py pattern (full HTTP E2E). V2 streaming work lives in app/agent/loop.py (_resolve + stream_turn); the resolve-then-stream approach is the thing to replace.
handoffs.handoff_summary: STATE: Phase 2 V1 is COMPLETE and validated on a real VAPI telephony call. The custom-LLM brain (our /vapi/chat/completions, Gemini 2.5 Flash via LiteLLM) owns orchestration/state/tools/extraction/post-processing; VAPI owns telephony/STT/TTS. Phase 1 (VAPI-native) remains the untouched fallback demo. Nothing is committed yet — all of this session's work is uncommitted on main (branch before committing per repo convention). ARCHITECTURE: per-turn = auth (query-param secret) -> get/create in-memory ConversationState by call.id -> build messages (strip VAPI system, inject our static+dynamic block; renderer-as-gate withholds claim_status until identity_verified) -> responder tool loop (resolve-then-stream) over lookup_claim/confirm_identity/faq_lookup -> stream OpenAI SSE -> parallel extractor updates current_intent (lag-by-one) -> write S3 turns trace after stream closes. End-of-call webhook: post-process (summary/sentiment/resolution/topic, flat structured output) -> Airtable write (SYNC, source of truth, no retry on fail) -> SQLite persist (calls+messages, best-effort fallback, airtable_synced flag) -> drop state. GOTCHAS LEARNED (all fixed): VAPI does NOT forward our secret to a custom LLM (its Authorization Bearer is a fixed placeholder), so auth is via ?secret= query param; VAPI APPENDS /chat/completions to the configured URL so the query value arrives as '<secret>/chat/completions' — server strips after first '/'. Webhooks still use X-Vapi-Secret. litellm needs orjson (added). Gemini include_usage has a content:None bug -> we chunk the resolved string for SSE and count completion tokens via litellm.token_counter (real token-streaming is V2). postprocess is SYNC (litellm.completion). Store self-heals (CREATE IF NOT EXISTS on every _conn). Logging: log/app.log catch-all + per-call log/<callId>.log + global exception handler; masked-phone + masked-secret-fingerprint helpers. NEXT SESSION: V2 — top priority streaming-with-tool-interception for latency (~2.6s/turn now); then align to TASK.md deliverables, prompt fine-tuning, more scenario testing, logging polish. User will detail priorities at session start — WAIT for that. Model: Opus 4.8 (1M). Follow CLAUDE.md (evidence over assumption; web-verify SDK/API before coding) and ponytail (laziest correct solution). Update docs/progress-phase2.json + docs/progress.md every turn.
